audit_items.proof_trace: All proofs are verified even for repeated commitments. Deduplication applies only to commitments (L79) for efficiency, but all proofs are passed to verify_multi_opening (L97-108). Each proof gets a unique random weight r^i and is included in both the Fiat-Shamir challenge (verifier.rs:311) and the pairing check, ensuring any invalid proof causes batch failure.
